text: Being here, I feel simultaneously curious and reflective. The environment is modern and clean, designed for discovery. As I step closer to the R+D exhibit, the language of innovation surrounds me — an invitation to ponder the relationship between humans and intelligent machines. The colors enliven my senses, making me feel energized, ready to question and learn. A sense of anticipation lingers, as if each display holds a secret about the future of coexistence and creativity.
